summary: Frontend testing completed for ERP Ceraldi. All requested features verified: Dashboard with compact scadenze and column headers, red Anno selector, Scadenze page with column headers, Riconciliazione without CSV/Carica F24 buttons, Contabilità Hub without Hub tab, Learning Machine with Impara Tutto button, all main pages (Fornitori, Fatture, F24, Dipendenti) loading correctly.

issues: Recharts width/height warnings in console (doesn't affect functionality)
React key warning for duplicate children - minor issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified. Prima Nota BANCA for 2024 shows 0 movements (data may need to be imported via Riconciliazione page which shows 4228 non-reconciled movements). App uses MongoDB Atlas backend.

dashboard_loads.details: Dashboard loads correctly with all widgets

scadenze_compact_headers.details: Scadenze widget shows column headers: TIPO, IMPORTO, DATA, GIORNI, DESCRIZIONE on a compact single row layout

anno_selector_red.details: Anno selector has red background (rgb(220, 38, 38) = #dc2626) and is clearly visible in TopNav

anno_selector_functional.details: Anno selector changes year and reloads data (verified change to 2024)

scadenze_page_headers.details: Scadenze page shows all 5 column headers (TIPO, IMPORTO, DATA, GIORNI, DESCRIZIONE) visible

riconciliazione_no_csv.details: Riconciliazione page does NOT have CSV button

riconciliazione_no_carica_f24.details: Riconciliazione page does NOT have 'Carica F24' button

contabilita_no_hub_tab.details: Contabilità Hub secondary tabs show only: Piano Conti, Bilancio, Cespiti (no Hub tab)

prima_nota_banca.details: Prima Nota page loads with CASSA 2024 and BANCA 2024 tabs. Shows 0 movements for 2024 (data not in this view, but 4228 movements available via Riconciliazione API)

learning_machine_loads.details: Learning Machine page loads with title, Impara Tutto button, and shows data: 321 fornitori, 480 cedolini, 1,051 corrispettivi, 209 assegni

impara_tutto_button.details: Impara Tutto button is visible and styled correctly

fornitori_loads.details: Fornitori page loads showing 316 fornitori with card grid layout

dipendenti_loads.details: Dipendenti page loads showing 2 employees (Giulia Bianchi, Mario Rossi) with dashboard, tabs, and employee cards

topnav_navigation.details: TopNav has direct links: Dashboard, Fatture (180 badge), Prima Nota, Banca (dot indicator), Fisco, Fornitori, HR. Only 'Altro' has dropdown menu

screenshots: dashboard_anno.jpeg - Dashboard with red Anno selector showing 2024
scadenze_page.jpeg - Scadenze page with column headers visible
contabilita_hub.jpeg - Contabilità with Piano Conti, Bilancio, Cespiti tabs (no Hub)
learning_machine.jpeg - Learning Machine with Impara Tutto button
